title: Peeves
description: A resource pack that fixes "Pet Peeves" involving MInecraft's textures. | 1.16 - 1.19+
body:
I've always had some pet-peeves about Minecraft's textures, and as a texture artist, I decided to take it upon myself and fix them! The goal of this pack is to either leave it alone or remake the texture entirely. Meaning, this pack does not fix recolor inconsistency, model issues, or any tiny pixel edits needed. Well, what are you waiting for, try it out!

 

 

 

How to Install
• Download the resource pack, it should be a .zip file.
• Locate the folder you saved the resource pack to and copy the .zip file.
• Open Minecraft and go to "Options" and then "Resource Packs."
• Click on "Choose Resource Pack Folder"
• Paste the .zip file into the folder and then head back into the game.
• The pack should be there, if not hit "Escape" and go back into "Resource Packs."

PLEASE do not redistribute this pack under your name and take or edit assets from the pack.
